name: Above-ground spa install
description: Standard above-ground portable spa: slab, power, position, handover. Prices are ex GST and are YOUR defaults - edit them in Settings > Price templates.

lineItems.notes: Half-day mobile crane incl. traffic control if street lift

lineItems.description: Electrical cable run from switchboard (trenched or clipped)
Dedicated circuit, isolator switch, connection and test
lineItems.notes: Licensed electrician, certificate of compliance supplied

lineItems.description: Tight access allowance - manual handling / spa trolley
Fill, commission, water balance and handover walkthrough
